title.en: Lag BaOmer Bonfires: What We're Celebrating and Why
title.zh: 拉格·巴欧梅尔篝火：我们在庆祝什么以及为什么
title.he: מדורות ל״ג בעומר: מה אנחנו חוגגים ולמה

headerImage.description: Traditional Chinese shan shui ink landscape depicting misty mountains at twilight with multiple bonfires burning on terraced hillsides, rendered in classic water-ink technique with warm amber and gold for flames
headerImage.alt: Lag BaOmer bonfires on mountainside in Chinese brush painting style
